description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. A spacious wraparound balcony with a decorative railing extends along two sides, providing outdoor living space and access to a hot tub. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and bedroom areas, and the furnishings are contemporary in style. The house appears to be a single-story structure elevated on a platform, with a main entryway accessible from the balcony. The overall aesthetic is sleek and urban, suitable for a city neighborhood or upscale residential area.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a wraparound balcony featuring a hot tub. The design is minimalist and urban, with open interior spaces and contemporary furnishings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the balcony with a hot tub, the main entry door, and a glimpse into the interior living and bedroom spaces.
description_view_1: The rear facade is shown here, dominated by large windows and a solid wall, with the balcony and hot tub visible on the left.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the house, the wraparound balcony, and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_3: The front facade is visible, showcasing the main balcony, large windows, and the open, accessible entryway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via balcony, simple door, no steps, and minimal decorative elements
